environment.runner: local normal terminal via escalated command

fixesValidated.change: Clears stale sandbox EPERM invalid-evidence artifact at the start of a fresh CI run so old invalid local attempts cannot poison a normal-terminal proof.
Previously fixed on dev/rc-gates-fix: scanner scope excludes evidence/data paths while continuing to scan source for real eslint-disable directives.
Gives the long session-to-analytics metric-parity journey a 90s timeout while preserving every product assertion; this removes shard-load flakiness without masking data/UI failures.
Updates model-load-failure protocol assertion for the current wrapped MODEL_LOAD_FAILED error string while still requiring the underlying model artifact error.

notes: First unsandboxed rerun reached Lighthouse but failed RC status because one shard-4 analytics parity test timed out once and passed on retry. The final run with the targeted timeout budget produced 0 failed and 0 flaky E2E tests.
A direct Playwright repro attempt was marked invalid and not counted because invoking it outside the RC wrapper booted the app with the wrong test-mode assumptions.
